name: Planet 13 Holdings Inc.
business: Planet 13 is a vertically integrated multi-state cannabis operator with cultivation, production, distribution, and dispensing operations in Nevada, California, Florida, and Illinois. The company sells cannabis flower, concentrates, edibles, topicals, and other products to retail customers through its dispensaries and to other licensed retailers via wholesale.
sellsTo: Adult-use consumers in Nevada, California, and Illinois

exposures.sentence: We currently own and manufacture cannabis products under the following brands: HaHa (gummies and beverages), Dreamland (chocolates), TRENDI (flower, vapes and concentrates), Medizin (flower, vapes, and concentrates), Leaf and Vine (flower and vapes) and have a customer-loyalty database of over 485,000 customers.
We operate our Nevada cultivation licenses at two separate facilities, each location operating jointly under a medical and adult-use cultivation license.
